title: The ability to hide the file column to users
excerpt:
I would like to be able to hide the file column to specific users. Right now you are only able to block it but they still can see it. 
Thanks.

posts.author: anna.indalecio (Anna Indalecio)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to be able to hide the file column to specific users. Right now you are only able to block it but they still can see it.
Thanks.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @anna.indalecio - you can hide columns from view for individual users if you are on PRO or ENT licensing.

Here is more information on Column Permissions: Column Permissions – Support (monday.com)

Thanks!
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: anna.indalecio (Anna Indalecio)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for your reply.
The option you present is available for all columns but the file column, which is the one that I am looking to hide.
